chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT LARKANA Cr. Misc. No. S- 428 of 2024 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge For non prosecution. 03.03.2025. Mr. Ashique Hussain kalhoro, Advocate for the Respondent No.3. Mr. Nazir Ahmed Bhangwar, Deputy Prosecutor General, Sindh ------------ Mr. Saeed Ahmed Bijarani, Advocate holds brief for Mr. Faraz Ali Bijarani, advocate for the Applicant and submits that F.I.R. has been registered and the very purpose of filing instant application has been served. Accordingly, instant criminal miscellaneous application stands dismissed having become infructuous. J U D G E S.Ashfaq
